summary: Iteration 24 - Ticket Printing 80mm POS Format, Export Excel, POS Serial Number Features Testing Complete. All critical features working correctly: 1) Ticket printing returns correct 80mm LOTO PAM format without 'En attente' or 'Gains potentiels', 2) Export Excel endpoints work for vendeur, supervisor, and company admin, 3) POS Serial Number validation endpoint returns availability status, 4) Agent creation form includes pos_serial_number field with real-time validation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users: admin@lotopam.com, supervisor@lotopam.com, agent.marie@lotopam.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 24 priority features are working correctly. Ticket printing 80mm format returns correct HTML without En attente/Gains potentiels. Export Excel buttons are present and functional. POS Serial Number field is in agent creation form with real-time validation.

ticket_printing_80mm.details: GET /api/ticket/print/{id} returns correct 80mm thermal format HTML. Contains LOTO PAM branding, VALIDÉ status, and no 'En attente' or 'Gains potentiels' text.

export_excel_vendeur.details: GET /api/export/vendeur/tickets returns Excel file (200 OK, 6540 bytes). GET /api/export/vendeur/winning-tickets also works.

export_excel_supervisor.details: GET /api/export/supervisor/tickets returns Excel file (200 OK, 6616 bytes). GET /api/export/supervisor/winning-tickets also works.

export_excel_company_admin.details: GET /api/export/company/tickets returns Excel file (200 OK, 6672 bytes). Company winning-tickets and sales-report endpoints also work.

pos_serial_validation.details: GET /api/company/check-pos-serial/{serial} returns {serial, available, message} correctly. New serials show available=true.

agent_creation_pos_field.details: Agent creation form includes pos_serial_number field (data-testid='agent-pos-serial'). Real-time validation shows availability status.

vendeur_export_button_ui.details: VendeurMesTickets page has Excel export button (data-testid='export-excel-btn') visible and clickable in top right corner.

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - All user types login correctly
GET /api/ticket/print/{id}?token={token}&format=thermal - Returns 80mm LOTO PAM format HTML
GET /api/company/succursales/{id} - Returns succursale details with agents
notes: Ticket print format correctly shows LOTO PAM branding with © JM STUDIO and lotopam.com
Print format does NOT contain 'En attente' text (requirement met)
Print format does NOT contain 'Gains potentiels' section (requirement met)
Print format shows 'STATUT : VALIDÉ' for all tickets
Print format uses 80mm thermal paper width CSS
All export endpoints return proper xlsx files with Content-Disposition headers
POS Serial Number field in agent creation has real-time debounced validation
Rate limiting may cause 429 errors during rapid testing - this is expected behavior
